◎简　　介  

　　是一部关于Jacques Demy 的《[http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0062873/洛城少女]》（Demoiselles de Rochefort，1966）的纪录片，片中混合了当初拍片的现场纪录和二十几年后Rochefort当地为影片庆生的实况。In 1967, the phenomenally successful director of the films Lola and the groundbreaking musical Les Parapluies de Cherbourg, Jacques Demy, arrived in the little port town of Rochefort and, together with his art director, decorated the whole...
